title: crotalaria breviflora
intro: Crotalaria breviflora, also known as the short-flowered Crotalaria, is a species of flowering plant in the legume family Fabaceae, native to tropical Africa. Traditionally, Crotalaria breviflora has been used in herbal medicine, where it is believed to possess antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties. The plant's medicinal properties are thought to provide health benefits such as wound healing, fever reduction, and the treatment of various gastrointestinal issues. Crotalaria breviflora can be prepared in various forms, including infusions, decoctions, and extracts, which are often used in traditional African medicine.
